title: Thai Chicken Curry
description: A classic Thai dish made with tender chicken and a flavorful curry sauce. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: 1. Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onion and ginger and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
4. Add the curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
5. Add the chicken broth and coconut milk, and bring to a simmer.
6. Reduce the heat to medium-low and let cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
7. Stir in the curry powder and sodium (or salty to taste).
8. Serve the chicken and sauce over rice or noodles, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
